channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Ratings
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Ordinary Seaman (OS) position is open for individuals to assist with deck operations and general ship maintenance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Ordinary Seaman (OS) Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

An Able Seaman (AB) is required to perform various deck duties, including navigation and maintenance.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman (AB) Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Bosun position is available, responsible for supervising deck crew and maintaining deck equipment.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Bosun Vacancy at Franco Compania Naviera S.A.

item.description:
Location: Kamchatka
Description:

A fishing company is seeking processing crew members for its fleet operating out of Kamchatka. This role offers a monthly income ranging from 180,000 to 220,000 RUB, with contracts typically lasting 4-5 months. The company provides a social package including travel and paid leave. Applicants must possess the necessary documents and undergo medical examinations. Interested individuals can find more information and apply via the provided contact details.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Matros Job on Fishing Vessels at Okeanrybflot JSC

item.description:
Location: Oman
Description:

Oman · Ro‑Ro · 5 months · Russian crew · Joining 24 July

We are seeking an Able Seaman (qualified or watchkeeping) for m/v TRANSIT SEDANKA (1996, Sierra Leone flag, AKASAKA 6UEC45LA main engine, 5295 kW). The vessel is a Ro‑Ro with 18 Russian crew members. Contract is 5 months. Joining will take place in Oman between 14 and 24 July. Salary: 153,000 RUB net per month + additional pay for lashing operations. All payments are made in RUB twice a month to the seafarer’s account. Medical examination is covered by the employer. Candidates from any region of Russia are welcome.

Key responsibilities:

- Mooring and unmooring operations
– Cargo securing and lashing
– Deck maintenance and cleaning
– Watchkeeping duties as directed
– Assisting in emergency drills

Essential requirements:

- Valid AB certificate (qual. or watchkeeping)
– Experience on Ro‑Ro vessels is an advantage
– Good command of English
– All valid STCW certificates and medical

What we offer:

- Competitive net salary + extra pay for lashing
– Payments twice a month
– Employer-paid medical examination
– Opportunity for Russian seafarers from any region



Apply to this job
item.title: [Job] Able Seaman (Qualified / Watchkeeping) – Ro‑Ro Vessel at Transit

item.description:
Location: Squamish, British Columbia
Description:

A Deckhand position is available on a passenger transfer vessel. Responsibilities include ensuring the safety of passengers and the vessel, performing lookout duties, and assisting with cargo operations. The role requires MED-DVS, Radio Operators Certificate – Marine, and Marine Basic or Advanced First Aid. Relevant marine experience is preferred. The contract is rotational, with a daily salary range of $378.00 to $420.00.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Deckhand Job on Passenger Transfer Vessel at Bridgemans Services Group LP (BSG)

item.description:
Location: Squamish, British Columbia
Description:

A Bosun position is available for a rotational contract of three years with possible extension. The role involves controlling deck operations, organizing deck activities, and maintaining the ship's deck. Key responsibilities include managing mooring and anchoring operations, and acting as a liaison between officers and crew. Minimum 3 years of professional experience as Bosun and STCW certification are required. The position is based in Squamish, British Columbia.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Bosun Job - Rotational Contract at Bridgemans Crew Management Ltd.

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A deck rating position for a Raftsman is available. This role is for a maritime professional with experience in raft maintenance and deployment. Further details regarding vessel type, contract duration, and joining date will be provided upon inquiry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Raftsman Job Vacancy at Tschudi Ship Management AS

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced AB Seamen and Firemen are sought for the MSC Cruises fleet. Positions offer a stable rotation of 6 months on board followed by 2 months at home, within an international working environment. Candidates require previous experience in mooring operations, ship maneuvering, and general deck duties, with a good command of English for effective communication within an international crew.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] AB Seaman Fireman Jobs on MSC Cruises Fleet at World of Seamen Group

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Deck ratings are sought for a Belgian-flagged research vessel. Positions include AB with a net salary of 3,210 EUR per month and Bosun with a net salary of 3,540 EUR per month. Joining dates are end of June and early July 2026 respectively, for an 8-week contract duration. This is a unique opportunity to work onboard a scientific vessel.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Bosun and AB Jobs on Research Vessel 3,540 EUR at CANDINA GROUP
